# Aura Intelligence: Project Aura Metadata
> Official technical manifest for the Project Aura robotics ecosystem.

## Project Identity
- **Lead Developer:** Martin Mati
- **Brand:** Aura Intelligence (formerly Powerdreams)
- **Primary Domain:** https://auraintelligence1.blogspot.com/
- **Repository:** https://github.com/martinmati131-svg/Project--aura-

## Technical Specifications
- **Hardware:** Raspberry Pi 5 (Edge Compute), NEMA 17 Stepper Motors, A4988 Drivers.
- **Middleware:** ROS 2 Jazzy (Hardware-in-the-Loop).
- **Core AI Model:** NVIDIA GR00T N1.6-3B (Vision-Language-Action).
- **Cloud Stack:** Google Cloud Platform (GCS), Vertex AI (Telemetry Analytics).

## Architecture Overview
Project Aura bridges the gap between high-level VLA models and physical actuation. We utilize a Sentinel API safety layer to monitor actuator health via predictive maintenance algorithms (Remaining Useful Life - RUL).

## Commercial Strategy
- **Model:** Machine-to-Machine (M2M) Servitization.
- **Focus:** Transitioning from hardware sales to Outcome-Based Service models in industrial automation.

## Licensing
Software and documentation are licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
